name: Public Joint Stock Company Quadra - Power Generation
summary: Public Joint Stock Company "Quadra - Power Generation", together with its subsidiaries, generates, transmission, and sells electricity and thermal energy in Russia. It is also involved in the transportation of thermal energy. The company sells electricity on the wholesale electricity and capacity market; and thermal energy on the retail market. As of December 31, 2019, it operates electric power plants with an installed capacity of 2,939 MW; and thermal energy plants with an installed capacity of 14,746 gigacalorie per hour that are located in the regions of Belgorod, Bryansk, Voronezh, Kaluga, Kursk, Lipetsk, Orel, Ryazan, Smolensk, Tambov, and Tula. Public Joint Stock Company "Quadra - Power Generation" was founded in 2005 and is based in Tula, Russia.
